title: dialog-replay-redaction — data schema
description: Type contracts for the serializer, recompress dispatch, and tweak deltas. No persistent schema changes; existing MessageV2 / CompactionPart / Anchor shapes unchanged.

SerializeRedactedDialogInput.description: Input to dialog-serializer.ts serializeRedactedDialog pure function.

messages.description: Tail of messages to serialise (typically post-prevAnchor stream)

startRound.description: Round number to start counting from. Use prevLastRound + 1 to continue numbering across extends.

excludeUserMessageID.description: User message id to skip during serialisation (Spec 1 synergy — unanswered user msg is handled by replay helper, not extend).

SerializeRedactedDialogResult.description: Return value of serializeRedactedDialog. Pure function, no side effects.

text.description: Markdown-formatted dialog text. Empty string if no messages emitted.

lastRound.description: Highest `## Round N` number emitted. Used by next extend's startRound.

messagesEmitted.description: Count of messages actually serialised (excludes the excluded unanswered user msg + skipped narration / synthetic msgs).

MarkdownDialogGrammar.description: The literal markdown produced by serializeRedactedDialog. Specified for parser compatibility (e.g. parsePrevLastRound regex).

TryNarrativeOutputDelta.description: Existing KindAttempt return type from tryNarrative. Behaviour change only; signature unchanged.

summaryText.description: Post-fix: prev anchor body + serialized redacted dialog. Pre-fix: Memory.renderForLLMSync output.

truncated.description: Always false post-fix (size-triggered recompress handles oversize, not truncation here)

reason.description: Set when ok===false. Values: 'memory empty', 'no resolvable model'

RecompressDispatchInput.description: Internal input to runCodexServerSideRecompress / runHybridLlmRecompress dispatched from scheduleHybridEnrichment.

anchorMessage.description: The anchor message whose body is to be recompressed

trigger.description: Which condition caused the recompress dispatch

RecompressTelemetryEvent.description: Bus event compaction.recompressed published after recompress completes (success or failure).

TweaksDelta.description: New keys added to tweaks.cfg / Tweaks.compactionSync(). Existing keys (enableHybridLlm etc.) unchanged.

enableDialogRedactionAnchor.description: Master switch for the entire restoration. When false: tryNarrative falls back to Memory.renderForLLMSync; transformPostAnchorTail falls back to v6 drop logic; scheduleHybridEnrichment retains legacy thresholds + observed-gate.

anchorRecompressCeilingTokens.description: Token threshold above which anchor body forces recompress. 50000 chosen empirically: ~100 rounds of dialog at 500 tokens/round average.

PostAnchorTransformV7Delta.description: Behaviour change only; existing TransformResult schema reused for back-compat.
PostAnchorTransformV7Delta.v6_behaviour: Drop completed assistant turns whose index is BEFORE lastUserIdx
PostAnchorTransformV7Delta.v7_behaviour: Pass-through all messages; per-tool-part replace state.output with `[recall_id: <part.id>]` placeholder
carve_outs_preserved: compaction-bearing assistants (Mode 1 inline server compaction state)

result_field_semantics.messages: Always present; v7 returns same length as input (no drops)
result_field_semantics.exemptTurnCount: Always 0 in v7 (carve-outs are render-time preservation, not drops)

ToolPartRedactionRule.description: How redactToolPart transforms a single ToolPart in v7.
skip_conditions: state.output is not a string (already redacted or non-text)

Observed.description: Existing enum from compaction module; reused. Recompress no longer gates on this — size-triggered.
